description_long: This object is a small, lifelike bird with a compact body and a slightly rounded head. Its plumage is predominantly brown with subtle variations in shading, giving it a natural, earthy appearance. The beak is short and conical, blending seamlessly with the head, and the eyes are faintly visible, set towards the front. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is moderately long, appearing slightly rounded and fanned at the tip. The legs are not clearly visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body or obscured by feathers. The overall texture of the surface is matte and slightly rough, resembling the natural feathering of a real bird.
description: A small, brown bird with a rounded body, conical beak, and subtly textured plumage. The wings are folded, and the tail is slightly rounded and fanned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's compact body, conical beak, and subtle feather texture along the back and tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fanned, rounded tail and the symmetry of the folded wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the beak and head profile visible and the tail extending back.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the beak and head, with the body tapering back and the tail barely visible.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid brown with subtle shading and slight mottling
